productDisplayName: Enroute Men Formal Black Formal Shoe
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this casual loafer makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. This pair comes with a shoe bag and a plastic tongue. Upper Leather upper with supple leather inner lining for comfort Perforations on the forefoot, with perforated overlays for style Midfoot strap to lock the foot down Padded footbed for all-day comfort Slip on style for easy on/off Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole Durable PU outsole with a raised and grooved TPR heel for grip, ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
